subject: docs(claude): add doc-cleanup trigger — structural doc hygiene
body:
Gap: `docs` covers content accuracy (drift, outdated claims, missing
API docs) and `clean` covers code duplication. Neither covers the
structural-hygiene questions around docs:
- Same content duplicated across multiple doc files
- Stale doc files no longer relevant (old design docs, migration notes
  from finished migrations)
- Orphaned docs nothing links to
- Files superseded by a replacement but never deleted
- Sections describing features that no longer exist

New trigger `doc-cleanup` / `dcl` in the quality group, placed next to
`docs` so accuracy and hygiene audits sit together.

Trigger count: 42 → 43.

Tags: documentation, triggers, claude-md
Complexity: 1
